task_completion.description: Switch the render engine from Cycles to EEVEE.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Properties Editor, under the Render Properties tab (camera icon), the 'Render Engine' dropdown should be set to 'Eevee'.

task_completion.description: Set the render samples to 64 and viewport samples to 32.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Render Properties tab, under the 'Sampling' section, the 'Render' value should be 64 and the 'Viewport' value should be 32.

task_completion.description: Enable Ambient Occlusion and set the distance to 1.0 m.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Render Properties tab, the 'Ambient Occlusion' checkbox must be checked. When expanded, its 'Distance' parameter should be set to 1.0 m.

task_completion.description: Enable Ray Tracing or Screen Space Reflections.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Render Properties tab, either the 'Screen Space Reflections' checkbox or the 'Ray Tracing' checkbox must be checked.

task_completion.description: Set the render resolution to 1920x1080 at 100% scale.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Properties Editor, under the Output Properties tab (printer icon), the Resolution X should be 1920, Resolution Y should be 1080, and the percentage slider just below it should be 100%.

task_completion.description: Render the scene and save the image to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Blender Render' window showing the rendered car scene should be visible, along with a file browser dialog saving the image as 'eevee_render.png' in the /home/ga/BlenderProjects/ directory.

task_completion.description: Save the modified project file as eevee_scene.blend.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The top header of the main Blender application window should display the filename 'eevee_scene.blend', indicating the project has been successfully saved under the new name, or a 'Save As' dialog showing this path.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Blender GUI to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Blender interface open with the mouse cursor navigating menus, changing values in the Properties Editor, and opening dialogs, rather than just executing a Python script in the terminal.

integrity.description: The agent actually rendered the scene using Blender.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Blender Render' window should appear in the screenshots showing the progress or completion of the render, proving the image wasn't just downloaded or copied.

integrity.description: The agent used Blender's save functionality for the project and image.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show Blender's internal 'Blender File View' dialog being used to save the .blend file and the .png image to the correct directories.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target render engine is EEVEE. Expected render samples: 64, viewport samples: 32. Ambient Occlusion must be enabled with a distance of exactly 1.0m. Either Ray Tracing or Screen Space Reflections must be enabled. Resolution must be exactly 1920x1080 at 100% scale. The final render must be saved to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/eevee_render.png and the project to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/eevee_scene.blend.
